subject: M Crashes during species creation
body:
Hello, 

I am trying to import a species into M that I have exported from Warp and 
refined in Relion. When I try to create the species using a Relion star 
file M crashes and gives this error: 

System.NullReferenceException: Object reference not set to an instance of 
an object.
   at Warp.NoiseNet3D.Dispose() in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\NoiseNet3D.cs:line 
301
   at Warp.NoiseNet3D.Finalize() in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\NoiseNet3D.cs:line 
290
   at Warp.NoiseNet3D.Dispose() in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\NoiseNet3D.cs:line 
301
   at Warp.NoiseNet3D.Finalize() in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\NoiseNet3D.cs:line 
290

Do you have any ideas what I may be doing wrong?

Thanks,
Ben
